privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to construct a new 3D model from scratch using SolveSpace without pre-existing data. The expected output file paths (/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/piston_groove.slvs and .step) precisely match the export scripts. The exact target dimensions for the piston (height 50mm, outer diameter 40mm, inner diameter 34mm, groove width 4mm, groove depth 3mm, groove offset 10mm) and corresponding radii are explicitly checked in the verifier's parameter checking logic.
